name: Nayms

custodian.name: On-chain custody of capital pools; off-chain reinsurance contracts

auditor.name: Per syndicate; smart contracts audited by Hats Finance, others

summary: First blockchain-based commercial insurance marketplace licensed by Bermuda Monetary Authority. Operates as digital Lloyd's-style market where syndicates underwrite specialty insurance (including digital asset custody, smart contract risk, crypto exchange D&O) with capital pools held on-chain. Bridges institutional insurance with on-chain capital efficiency. Notable for being fully regulated by an established insurance jurisdiction (BMA) rather than operating in regulatory gray zone.

sources.title: Bermuda Monetary Authority: digital asset business sandbox

underlying_asset: Commercial insurance risk: specialty lines including crypto custody, smart contract, exchange D&O.
reserve_composition: Capital pools per syndicate; tokens represent proportional capital provision.
secondary_market: Token transferability subject to syndicate terms; limited secondary trading.
oracle_provider: Claims adjudicated through traditional insurance process; payouts triggered on-chain after claim approval.
redemption_mechanism: Capital locked for policy duration; profit distributions on policy expiry less claims.

timeline.event: Nayms Insurance Limited launched in Bermuda sandbox
Migration to Base L2 for scaling
